chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4442 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.18476/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025 Mr. Umer Ilyas Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate files power on behalf of respondents 2 & 3, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel, notice/s has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
